feature.name: Shelter of the Faithful
feature.text: You and your adventuring companions can expect free healing and care at a temple, shrine, or other established presence of your faith, though you must provide any material components needed for spells.

feature.name: False Identity
feature.text: You have created a second identity that includes documentation, established acquaintances, and disguises that allow you to assume that persona.

feature.name: Criminal Contact
feature.text: You have a reliable and trustworthy contact who acts as your liaison to a network of other criminals.

feature.name: By Popular Demand
feature.text: You can always find a place to perform, usually in an inn or tavern, and you receive free lodging and food of a modest or comfortable standard while you perform.

feature.name: Rustic Hospitality
feature.text: Common folk will provide you with simple assistance, such as shelter and food, as long as you do not endanger them.

feature.name: Guild Membership
feature.text: As an established and respected member of a guild, you can rely on certain benefits that membership provides.

feature.name: Discovery
feature.text: The quiet seclusion of your extended hermitage gave you access to a unique and powerful discovery.

feature.name: Position of Privilege
feature.text: Thanks to your noble birth, people are inclined to think the best of you. You are welcome in high society, and common folk make every effort to accommodate you.

feature.name: Wanderer
feature.text: You have an excellent memory for maps and geography, and you can always recall the general layout of terrain, settlements, and other features around you.

feature.name: Researcher
feature.text: When you attempt to learn or recall a piece of lore, if you do not know that information, you often know where and from whom you can obtain it.

feature.name: Ship's Passage
feature.text: You can secure free passage on a sailing ship for yourself and your companions, provided you can work for your passage.

feature.name: Military Rank
feature.text: You have a military rank from your career as a soldier. Soldiers loyal to your former military organization still recognize your authority.

feature.name: City Secrets
feature.text: You know the secret patterns and flow to cities and can find passages through the urban sprawl that others would miss.
